scripts.dev: bun run --cwd packages/backend dev & bun run --cwd packages/frontend dev
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/common build && bun run --cwd packages/backend typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/frontend typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/common test && bun run --cwd packages/backend test && bun run --cwd packages/frontend test
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/common build && bun run --cwd packages/backend build && bun run --cwd packages/frontend build
